assessments.status_rationale: Today’s coverage does not mention Kevin Warsh, a nomination, or any Senate Banking Committee confirmation hearing for a Federal Reserve leadership role. Deadline is 2026-06-30, so this remains unresolved.
No news item states an FOMC rate cut or confirms the current target range versus 2026-04-09. With the deadline at 2026-07-31, this prediction cannot be judged yet.
While Iran-related tensions are referenced, there is no cited OVX close level (or any confirmation of OVX ≥ 70 on a trading day). Deadline is 2026-06-30; unresolved.

Articles note fuel-price pressure (e.g., protests tied to higher fuel prices), but none provides AAA’s U.S. national average regular gasoline price or confirms it reached ≥ $4.25/gal. Deadline is 2026-06-30; unresolved.
No item reports that the U.S. Department of Energy announced an emergency SPR release/sale totaling at least 15 million barrels. Deadline is 2026-07-31; unresolved.
No bullet references the FAO Food Price Index or provides year-over-year comparisons for 2026 months. Deadline is 2026-09-15; unresolved.
Market-related bullets discuss sentiment and individual stocks but do not document an S&P 500 single-day close-to-close decline of ≥ 3.5%. Deadline is 2026-06-30; unresolved.

Despite Middle East security coverage, there is no report that any listed Gulf state announced a full temporary national airspace closure lasting ≥ 12 hours explicitly citing military/security risk. Deadline is 2026-06-30; unresolved.

No item indicates the EU adopted and published (in the Official Journal) a new Iran-related sanctions update listing shipping/maritime-logistics entities and at least five specific vessels. Deadline is 2026-12-31; unresolved.
